subject: Physics
chapter: System of Particles and Rotational Motion

formulas.name: Newton's Third Law of Motion
formulas.formula: For every action, there is an equal and opposite reaction.
formulas.notes: Describes the relationship between two interacting objects.

formulas.name: Center of Mass Formula
formulas.variables: x: x-coordinate of the center of mass, m: mass of the particles, x: x-coordinate of the particles
formulas.notes: Calculates the x-coordinate of the center of mass of a system of particles.

formulas.name: Center of Mass Formula (y-coordinate)
formulas.variables: y: y-coordinate of the center of mass, m: mass of the particles, y: y-coordinate of the particles
formulas.notes: Calculates the y-coordinate of the center of mass of a system of particles.

formulas.name: Moment of Inertia of a Point Mass
formulas.variables: I: moment of inertia, m: mass of the point mass, r: distance of the point mass from the axis of rotation
formulas.notes: Calculates the moment of inertia of a point mass.

formulas.name: Moment of Inertia of a Rod
formulas.variables: I: moment of inertia, m: mass of the rod, L: length of the rod
formulas.notes: Calculates the moment of inertia of a rod.

formulas.name: Angular Momentum of a Particle
formulas.variables: L: angular momentum, r: position vector of the particle, m: mass of the particle, v: velocity of the particle
formulas.notes: Calculates the angular momentum of a particle.

formulas.name: Torque Formula
formulas.variables: τ: torque, r: position vector of the point of application of the force, F: force applied
formulas.notes: Calculates the torque applied to an object.

formulas.name: Rotational Kinetic Energy
formulas.variables: K: rotational kinetic energy, I: moment of inertia, ω: angular velocity
formulas.notes: Calculates the rotational kinetic energy of an object.

formulas.name: Work Done in Rotational Motion
formulas.variables: W: work done, τ: torque, θ: angle of rotation
formulas.notes: Calculates the work done in rotating an object.

formulas.name: Rotational Kinetic Energy (from linear kinetic energy)
formulas.variables: K: rotational kinetic energy, M: mass of the object, v: linear velocity of the object
formulas.notes: Expresses rotational kinetic energy in terms of linear kinetic energy.

formulas.name: Angular Momentum of a System of Particles
formulas.variables: L: angular momentum, r: position vector of the particles, m: mass of the particles, v: velocity of the particles
formulas.notes: Calculates the total angular momentum of a system of particles.

formulas.name: Conservation of Angular Momentum
formulas.notes: States that the total angular momentum of a closed system remains constant over time.

formulas.name: Torque and Angular Acceleration
formulas.variables: τ: torque, I: moment of inertia, α: angular acceleration
formulas.notes: Describes the relationship between torque and angular acceleration.

formulas.name: Rotational Motion of a Rigid Body
formulas.variables: α: angular acceleration, τ: torque, I: moment of inertia
formulas.notes: Describes the rotational motion of a rigid body.
